Natural cinematic beach lifestyle photography, SCARLETT in light casual beach clothing suitable for walking and carrying a canvas tote bag stands at the water's edge facing the open ocean with body slightly angled and bare feet planted in the shallow wash, poised in a quiet moment of reflection as another wave crests and begins to break toward her, wet sand shoreline at Bondi Beach with rolling turquoise waves and white foam stretching into the distance under bright natural daylight, warm directional sunlight casting clean shadows across the sand and creating sparkling reflections on the water surface, eye-level handheld camera angle with shallow depth of field keeping the figure sharp while softly blurring the distant ocean horizon, fresh sensory composition with tactile details of sand and water, high resolution clean bright color grading with true-to-life tones and airy highlights.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH SHORELINE - DAY - Wet sand shoreline at Bondi Beach where waves gently wash over bare feet
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity.
